pages.text: “Well, does that fit your appetite? Oh, this time truly moved to tears I guess…”$(br)“To be honest, if can’t make your chefs stop brainstorming, why don’t you try cooking by yourself?”$(br)“Local you make local meal, sounds way better than command your smatter chefs anyway. If not, you may try asking The Profane to teach you, they seem good temper.”$(br)“I’m kinda curious, dear Vizier. What’s your hometown like? From your cookbook I tasted out wide, boundless and hot, very different from the dark forest.”
“Do you return hometown, frequently? Or never? Anyway, wish you can enjoy authentic hometown feast soon.”$(br)“Until we meet again—wait wait wait the Ruby! OK, see ya!”
